name: afterhours
description: Use Afterhours to discover upscale dining locations, hotel restaurants, and gourmet delicacies in urban areas. Afterhours features an extensive selection of elite and full-service venues, all offering fluctuating rates on their complete menus, every hour of every day. There's no need to fuss about payments or particulars, as Afterhours is free 100% of charge. Just select your time and rate, book your desired time, and arrive at your table, everything else is taken care of.
